title: willughbeia beccarii
intro: Willughbeia beccarii, also known as the Borneo willughbeia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to the tropical forests of Borneo, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and stems. The roots and stems of the plant are known to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its health benefits.
